# Disability Research

Empowering people with disabilities through research, demonstrations, and employment support

## Research & Demonstrations

* * *

[**Demonstrations**](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/demos.htm)

Temporary initiatives to identify services, supports, and policies to support people with disabilities.

Current Demonstrations

- [Interventional Cooperative Agreement Program (ICAP)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/icap.html)
- [Promoting Work through Early Intervention Project (PWEIP)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/pweip.html)
- [SOAR in Georgia County Jails Pilot (SGCJP)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/SGCJP.html)
- [Supportive Housing & Individual Placement and Support (SHIPS)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/SHIPS.html)
- [Vocational Resource Facilitation Demonstration (VRFD)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/VRFD.html)
- [Youth Transition Exploration Demonstration (YTED)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/YTED.html)

Completed Demonstrations

- [Accelerated Benefits](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/accelerated.htm)
- [Disability Program Navigator (DPN)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/dpn.htm)
- [Promoting Readiness of Minors in SSI (PROMISE)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/promise.htm)
- [Retaining Employment and Talent After Injury/Illness Network (RETAIN)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/retain.htm)
- [Supported Employment Demonstration (SED)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/sed_puf.html)
- [Technical Expert Panels (TEPs)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/teps.htm)
- [Youth Transition Demonstration (YTD)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/youth.htm)

[**Other Research & Analysis**](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/other_research.htm)

Articles, reports, evaluations, briefing papers, and other studies related to disability, work, and related topics.

Current Research

- [Ticket to Work Program Evaluation](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/ticketevaluation.html)

Completed Research

- [Beyond Benefits Study](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/bbs.htm)
- [Cardiovascular Disability: Updating the Social Security Listings](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/cardiovascular_report.htm)
- [Consultative Examination (CE) Study](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/ce.htm)
- [Employment Network Payment Structure Evaluation](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/EN-payment-structure-eval.html)
- [HIV and Disability: Updating the Social Security Listings](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/hiv_report.htm)
- [SSI Youth Community Based Services and Supports](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/SSI-Youth-Community-Services.html)
- [SSI Youth Employment Evidence Report](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/SSI-Youth-Employment.html)
- [Vocational Expert Study Panel](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/vocational.htm)
- [WIPA Service Model Analysis](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/wipa-service-model-analysis.html)
- [Work Disability Functional Assessment Battery (WD-FAB) Research Study](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/WD-FAB_Research_Study.htm)

[**Data & Surveys**](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/data_surveys.htm)

Information released by SSA for the general public to use in statistical analyses.


Data & Surveys

- [National Survey of SSI Children and Families (NSCF)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/nscf.htm)
- [Occupational Information System (OIS) Project](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/occupational_info_systems.html)

Additional Project Data

- [Quick Disability Determinations (QDD)](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/qdd.htm)

## Employment Support

* * *

[**Work Incentive Policies & Resources**](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/workincentives.htm)

Policies to help beneficiaries work by protecting cash and medical benefits.

[**Employment Services**](https://www.ssa.gov/disabilityresearch/ttw.htm)

Programs and services to help beneficiaries return to work and succeed in the labor force, including the Ticket to Work Program.
